name: Google Container Registry allows excessive high privileges to user/service accounts
description: GCR grants excessive privileges that could allow supply chain attacks
conditions: iam_policy.bindings ANY (role IN ('roles/artifactregistry.admin', 'roles/artifactregistry.repoAdmin', 'roles/artifactregistry.writer', 'roles/storage.admin', 'roles/storage.objectAdmin') AND (members CONTAINS 'user:' OR members CONTAINS 'serviceAccount:'))
remediation: Restrict registry write access. Implement CI/CD-only push policies.
